subject: add agent helper files
instructions: add AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md. Agents md points to claude md
lastOutput:
Done. Here's what was created:

- **`CLAUDE.md`** — Documents the project's architecture, build commands (`npm run dev`, `npm run build`), directory structure, key conventions (strict TS, shared types, Tailwind), and the full ticket dispatch workflow.
- **`AGENTS.md`** — A single-line pointer to `CLAUDE.md`, keeping one source of truth while supporting tools that look for either file.

https://github.com/jess-bergs/agent-kanban/pull/11
